title: anthyllis variiflora
intro: Anthyllis variiflora, also known as kidney vetch or varietas vetch, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of anthyllis variiflora include its ability to support kidney function, reduce urinary tract infections, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusum, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote urinary health and reduce inflammation.
